message:
test(e2e): add Twilio connector compliance test suite

New E2E compliance test for the Twilio connector, gated behind
#[cfg(feature = "twilio")]. Follows the established connector E2E
pattern: default deny, valid token invoke, network guard, and
risk/idempotency gating. Uses MockApiServer for deterministic testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
